activities_projects.title: Gender Division Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how gender division affects society
steps: Write examples of gender roles in family and workplace
Explain how these roles affect opportunities for women
Suggest ways to promote gender equality
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops analytical understanding of gender division
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of analysis and suggestions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Time Use Survey Project
activities_projects.objective: Study differences in work patterns of men and women
steps: Record daily activities of two male and two female family members
Categorise activities such as paid work, household work and leisure
Calculate total hours spent and compare results
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of data and interpretation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Women Representation Study
activities_projects.objective: Examine women's representation in political institutions
steps: Collect data about women representation in Lok Sabha and State Assemblies
Compare with global averages
Write a report explaining reasons for low representation
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of report and analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Feminist Movement Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of feminist movements
steps: Research the goals of feminist movements
Identify major achievements of these movements
Discuss their impact on education and employment opportunities for women
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands social movements for gender equality

activities_projects.title: Forms of Communalism Chart
activities_projects.objective: Identify different forms of communal politics
steps: List different forms of communalism
Provide examples for each form
Illustrate the impact of communalism on society
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands communal politics and its consequences
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness and clarity of chart (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Secularism Case Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of secularism in democracy
steps: Explain the concept of a secular state
List constitutional provisions that ensure secularism
Write how secularism helps maintain social harmony

activities_projects.title: Religious Diversity Research
steps: List major religious communities in India
Find their population percentages
Explain how diversity influences politics
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands religious diversity and its political impact
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of data and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Caste Inequality Investigation
steps: Explain historical reasons for caste inequality
Identify modern changes in caste relations
Discuss whether caste inequality still exists today
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops critical understanding of caste system

activities_projects.title: Caste and Elections Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how caste influences electoral politics
steps: Collect examples where caste influenced elections
Explain how political parties consider caste composition
Discuss whether caste alone determines election results
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands relationship between caste and politics

activities_projects.title: Debate: Social Divisions and Democracy
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the impact of social divisions on democracy
steps: Divide class into groups
Discuss whether social divisions strengthen or weaken democracy
Present arguments supported by examples
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of arguments and participation (10 marks)
